final_answer: MATCH (p:Patent)-[:APPLIED_BY]->(o:Organization)-[:LOCATED_IN]->(loc:Location), (p)-[:BELONGS_TO]->(td:TechDomain {name: '氢制冷'}) WHERE loc.province = '北京市' WITH substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) AS year, count(DISTINCT p)) AS count RETURN year, count ORDER BY year

pred_cypher: MATCH (p:Patent) WHERE substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) >= '2017' AND substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) <= '2018' WITH substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) AS year, count(DISTINCT p) AS count RETURN year, count ORDER BY year
final_answer: MATCH (p:Patent) WHERE substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) >= '2017' AND substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) <= '2018' WITH substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) AS year, count(DISTINCT p) AS count RETURN year, count ORDER BY year

question: 在合金储氢领域，涉及诉讼的专利所占比例是多少？

question: 宝马股份公司受让的专利中，有多少比例的专利发生过转让？
gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Patent)-[:TRANSFERRED_TO]->(o:Organization) WHERE o.name CONTAINS '宝马股份公司' WITH count(DISTINCT CASE WHEN p.transfer_count > 0 THEN p END) AS with_transfer, count(DISTINCT p) AS total RETURN with_transfer, total, round(with_transfer * 100.0 / total * 100) / 100 AS ratio

final_answer: MATCH (p:Patent)-[:TRANSFERRED_TO]->(o:Organization) WHERE o.name CONTAINS '宝马股份公司' WITH count(DISTINCT CASE WHEN p.transfer_count > 0 THEN p END)) AS with_transfer, count(DISTINCT p)) AS total RETURN with_transfer, total, round(with_transfer * 100.0 / total * 100) / 100.0 AS ratio

pred_cypher: MATCH (p:Patent) WHERE substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) >= '2006' AND substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) <= '2009' RETURN p.application_no AS app_no, p.title_cn AS title, substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) AS year LIMIT 50
final_answer: MATCH (p:Patent) WHERE substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) >= '2006' AND substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) <= '2009' RETURN p.application_no AS app_no, p.title_cn AS title, substring(p.application_date, 0, 4) AS year LIMIT 50

question: 在有质押记录的专利中，涉及诉讼的比例大约是多少？

final_answer: MATCH (p:Patent)-[:APPLIED_BY]->(o:Organization)-[:LOCATED_IN]->(loc:Location) WHERE loc.country = '中国' AND loc.province = '广东省' AND loc.city = '深圳市' WITH count(DISTINCT CASE WHEN p.litigation_count > 0 THEN p END)) AS with_litigation, count(DISTINCT p)) AS total RETURN with_litigation, total, round(with_litigation * 100.0 / total * 100) / 100.0 AS ratio

gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Patent)-[:APPLIED_BY]->(o:Organization) WHERE o.name CONTAINS '现代汽车公司' RETURN p.application_no AS app_no, p.title_cn AS title, p.application_date AS date ORDER BY p.application_date DESC LIMIT 10

question: 印度有哪些机构在合金储氢领域申请了专利，各机构的专利数量排名前二十是怎样的？
gold_cypher: MATCH (p:Patent)-[:APPLIED_BY]->(o:Organization)-[:LOCATED_IN]->(loc:Location), (p)-[:BELONGS_TO]->(td:TechDomain {name: '合金储氢'}) WHERE loc.country = '印度' MATCH (p)-[:APPLIED_BY]->(o:Organization) WITH o.name AS org, count(DISTINCT p) AS count RETURN org, count ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 20
